global.description: The ad features a green gradient background with a central content area highlighting a service.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple signup for a financial service.

elements.label: Green gradient background
elements.description: A smooth green gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center with a light color, designed to hold key information.

elements.label: Main text description
elements.description: Bold black text stating 'Secure & simple' with a smaller font below it for additional details.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Smaller black text that reads 'Fast signup, instant card' positioned below the main text.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.
